title: quercus acutissima subsp. chenii
intro: Quercus acutissima subsp. chenii is a subspecies of the Japanese evergreen oak plant, native to China. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus acutissima subsp. chenii include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
